title: tillaeastrum aquaticum
intro: Tillaeastrum aquaticum, also known as Water Tillie, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Tillaeastrum aquaticum include reducing inflammation, alleviating symptoms of various gastrointestinal disorders, and potentially acting as an antispasmodic. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and may be used topically to treat skin conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
